reviews.comment:
Impecable todo... muy moderna !!! La atención muy buena. Los sanitarios muy prolijos y muy limpios. Aceptan todas las tarjetas de débito y de crédito. Todos los servicios de lubricantes y cambios de aceite. Maxikiosko muy surtido...

(Translated by Google)
Everything was impeccable... very modern! The service was excellent. The restrooms were very tidy and clean. They accept all debit and credit cards. They offer all types of lubricants and oil changes. The convenience store is very well-stocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncEppNzVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una estación modelo todo perfecto desde la atención hasta la limpieza da gusto pasar!!! Más que recomendable y es muy simple llegar desde circunvalación.

(Translated by Google)
It's a model station, everything is perfect, from the service to the cleanliness. It's a pleasure to visit! Highly recommended, and it's very easy to get to from the ring road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbWVlWWpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los empleados muy bien entrenados en atención. Lugar limpio. No muy bueno el acceso y la salida ya que está el semáforo y siempre hay cola de autos.. hay que buscar el hueco y acelerar.

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very well trained in customer service. The place is clean. Access and exit aren't great because there's a traffic light and there's always a line of cars... you have to find a gap and accelerate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJenBXR0tnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hace 45 minutos estoy esperando que en la oficina del ACÁ el responsable de esta oficina se haga presente en el lugar. Si el horario es hasta las 18 hs porque no está? Vergonzoso

(Translated by Google)
I've been waiting 45 minutes for the person in charge of the ACA office to show up. If the office is open until 6 PM, why isn't he here? Shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJZ3N5SlB3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, nos dejaron estacionar por horas mientras recorrimos la ciudad a pie.t
Todo sin costo por ser socios.
La atención de la gente de playa muy buena

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; they let us park for hours while we explored the city on foot. All at no extra cost for members.
The beach staff were also very helpful.
